svg.text: py-spy record --rate 49 --duration 60 --format flamegraph -o /tmp/pyc_ground_truth/benchmark/benchmarks/results/profiles/ground_truth/host86_ground_truth_tuned3_nopyload/pyspy_flame_steadyish_long.svg -- python3 benchmark/benchmarks/gpu/ground_truth/encoder_ground_truth.py --device cuda --dtype float16 --hidden 2048 --pad-hidden-to 16 --warmup 80 --iters 8000 --bucket-lengths 256 --batch-sizes 64 --single-shape-seq-len 256 --skip-batch-scaling --allow-tf32 --use-inplace-residual --output /tmp/pyc_ground_truth/benchmark/benchmarks/results/profiles/ground_truth/host86_ground_truth_tuned3_nopyload/steadyish_long_profile.json
